positive: A highly stylized, abstract jungle fauna silhouette print. Central composition featuring a grouping of whimsical, leaping jungle animals—a playful monkey, a graceful toucan, a sloth hanging from a vine, and a jaguar poised on leaves—interwoven with stylized tropical flora like monstera leaves and stylized vines. The style is a vibrant, graphic illustration, reminiscent of woodcut linocut mixed with modern vector art. Strong, thick outlines, bold black silhouettes against a clean, off-white background. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette: deep emerald green, vibrant teal blue, warm mustard yellow, and black ink. The composition should be centered and easily readable, designed for large-scale apparel printing. Clean lines, intricate detail, highly scalable, minimalist yet maximalist.
